nodes.name: 缅甸
nodes.summary: 緬甸聯邦共和國（緬甸語：ပြည်ထောင်စု သမ္မတ မြန်မာနိုင်ငံတော်，羅馬化：Pranyhtaungcu. Sa.ma.ta.

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The blue-winged pitta is regularly found in Brunei, Cambodia, China, India, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam, and has been found to be vagrant in Australia, Christmas Island, Taiwan and Hong Kong. Habitat is lowland subtropical and tropical forests. P
